Twitch Streamer Asmongold Banned After Racist Rant About Palestinians

comments.body: Why is it always the stupidest, grossest swamp creatures that feel an innate superiority over other humans? If anything this piece of shit proves that white people can be the lowliest scum on the planet, and that being scum is about the quality of the heart in your chest and not the color of your skin.
You can't be a real person saying this...

"White people can be the lowliest scum on the earth, it's not about skin color tho."

????

It means a piece of trash white person can be as trashy or as classy as any other person regardless of color. the idea of innate white superiority is instantly proven wrong by the very existence of asmongoul. when i said ‘white person’ i’m obviously referencing the trash streamer who was banned, who specifically is more filthy than pretty much any white or non white person i have ever met in my life. 

Some of the best people I have met in my life and some of the worst people I have met in my life have been white, and what I’m saying is that the quality of their character is in no way shape or form due to the color of their skin, but due to the person beneath the skin. The same goes for any human being on the planet.

Would actually be pretty great if RDJ spent his twilight years using all the money he made off Marvel to fight off the corporate AI plague in Hollywood.

comments.body: Jake Paul did not know how to play Punch Out! He can't even beat Glass Joe. What a joke. Maybe he needs a new Punch Out with only amateur boxers and influencers.
